---
title: "Python Verbose Test"
format: html
engine: knitr
jupyter: python3
---

\`\`\`{python}

#\| label: verbose-test

#\| echo: true

#\| output: true

#\| warning: true

#\| error: true

import sys import pandas as pd import os

print("=== PYTHON DIAGNOSTICS ===") print("Python version:", sys.version) print("Executable:", sys.executable) print("Working directory:", os.getcwd()) print("Pandas version:", pd.\_\_version\_\_)

print("\n=== FILE CHECK ===") print("tblastn_results.tsv exists?", os.path.exists("tblastn_results.tsv")) print("Files in folder:", \[f for f in os.listdir(".") if "tblastn" in f.lower() or f.endswith(".tsv")\])
